author: u/zepto_fan
title: Zepto vs Blinkit
text: Switched to Zepto because they actually show me new trending snacks that I want to try. Blinkit just shows me my old grocery list.

author: Neha Sharma
title: Better Discovery
text: Instamart has these nice curated collections like 'Movie Night' which helps me discover new chips and drinks. Blinkit feels too utilitarian.
